narrativeAtSnapshot: Uniswap V2 is the dominant decentralized exchange by volume with $150-200M daily trading. The UNI governance token was airdropped on September 16 to ~250K historical users (400 UNI each). Governance proposals are actively being discussed. Mention growth: approximately 3x week-over-week in DeFi-native communities (Discord, Telegram, DeFi Twitter). No Bloomberg or mainstream financial media coverage. Retail awareness minimal — primarily DeFi-native users. Community governance treasury holds $6B+ in UNI tokens. V3 development rumors circulating in developer channels. Strong structural signal: 3 elite developers actively committing, cross-asset coordination with major DeFi protocols (AAVE, Compound integrations). DEX volume market share >60%.
